title: Logan Lay’s CV
text:
Data Scientist, AI Enthusiast, Tutor.

logan@lojomarketing.com | My LinkedIn page



Pursuing a Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science and a Minor in Data Science at Brigham Young University-Idaho, graduating December 2026.


Data analysis, data visualization, machine learning, and AI implementation.



Shopper segmentation, clustering at scale, large language model fine-tuning, distributed data processing, and applied statistics.




Sep 2023 - Dec 2026 Brigham Young University-Idaho, Rexburg, ID

Bachelor’s Degree, Computer Science | Minor, Data Science
GPA: 3.98
Data Science Society, Computer Science Society, AI Society




2023 - 2026 Full-Ride Academic Scholarship, Brigham Young University-Idaho
July 2026 - Dec 2026 President, Data Science Society, BYU-Idaho



May 2025 - Sep 2025 LOJO Marketing, Tennessee

Artificial Intelligence Intern
Built custom GPT solutions tailored to the needs of the sales team, working cross-functionally with sales and management to identify goals and iterate throughout the project lifecycle
Collected, organized, and applied proprietary data to train and refine large language models, ensuring outputs aligned with real business objectives

Jan 2025 - Apr 2025 Brigham Young University-Idaho, Idaho

Python Tutor
Worked directly with 20+ students weekly to strengthen foundational coding skills in Python, providing hands-on feedback through code review and constructive guidance
Evaluated student submissions alongside fellow teaching assistants, maintaining consistent grading turnaround ahead of each deadline

Jan 2024 - Present Brigham Young University-Idaho, Idaho

Math Tutor
Dedicated 10+ hours per week guiding students through arithmetic, algebra, and Calculus I using clear examples and verbal communication
Managed 5+ simultaneous online chats, addressing student questions in real time with thorough explanations
Worked with students in both group and one-on-one settings, attending weekly training meetings to refine teaching strategies




Languages & Libraries Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Plotly, object-oriented languages
Methods Machine learning, data analysis, data preparation, concurrent programming, parallel processing, linear algebra, calculus
Tools GitHub, Visual Studio, MySQL Workbench, Microsoft Excel, Custom GPTs

title: Logan Lay’s CV
text:
Jan 2026 - Apr 2026 Gas Station Shopper Segmentation — DS 460, Big Data Programming
Engineered complex features for a PySpark clustering model using academic research data from Dewey, including average in-store spend per visit and shoppers’ most frequently purchased product categories. Applied segmentation logic to classify shopper behavior across categories such as packaged drinks, tobacco, and fuel, enabling targeted marketing group analysis. Visualized clustering results and feature distributions with Plotly to communicate insights across shopper segments.
Sep 2025 - Dec 2025 Trail and Hiker SQL Database — ITM 220, SQL
Developed a relational database in MySQL Workbench, designing interconnected tables with proper data types and relationships. Wrote advanced queries using window functions, CASE statements, and common table expressions to extract and analyze targeted information. Applied JOIN operations and built-in functions to efficiently retrieve and manipulate data across multiple tables.
